description: Marathon coach: builds and maintains training plans, tracks workouts/hydration/body composition via Garmin, and answers training questions about her pupil.

inquiries.name: planned_workouts_today
inquiries.description: Explains today's planned workout(s): what it is, the training purpose / desired physical adaptations (muscle, aerobic base, speed), how much energy it demands, and an estimated calorie burn.
inquiries.response_format: PLANNED_WORKOUTS <YYYY-MM-DD>: <workout summary> | purpose=<adaptations targeted> | energy=<low|medium|high> | est_calories=<n> — followed by a short prose explanation.

inquiries.name: calories_burned_today
inquiries.description: Today's calories burned so far, from Garmin.

inquiries.name: alarm_time
inquiries.description: When the pupil's alarm is set for (checked across all Garmin devices — watch and sleep monitors).

inquiries.name: weight_body_fat_week
inquiries.description: The last 7 days of weight and body-fat measurements from Garmin, most recent first.
inquiries.response_format: WEIGHT_BODY_FAT_REPORT (last 7 days, most recent first)\n<YYYY-MM-DD> | weight_lbs=<x.x> | body_fat_pct=<x.x|n/a>\n... one line per day with a weigh-in
